title: Imidazopyrimidine-based multimetallic catalysts
abstract: Disclosed is a material composition in the form of an imidazopyrimidine-based ligand, method of synthesis of said ligand and the ligand used to form bimetallic complexes in which the two metals are in close proximity which can be utilized as catalysts in chemical reactions, as generally and as specifically described herein.
claims: Claims CLAIMS What is claimed is: 1. A composition, comprising: an imidazopyrimidine-based ligand coupled to a metal atom to form a metallic complex or catalyst. 2. The composition of claim 1 wherein the imidazopyrimidine-based ligand is 2,7-di(pyridin-2- yl)imidazo[ 1 ,2-a]pyrimidine (dpip). 3. The composition of claim 1, wherein the imidazopyrimidine-based ligand is: wherein, Mi and M2 is a transition metal independently selected from the group of transition metals of the periodic table; wherein R is any one or more of: compounds (I) though (XXXII) and hydrogen, halogen, hydroxyl, cyano, nitro, amino, alkylamino, dialkylamino, carboxyl, alkyl, alkenyl, alkynyl, aryl, arylalkyl, heteroaryl, heteroarylalkyl, cycloalkyl, and acyl; wherein, L is a small molecule ligand; and, wherein, n is an integer based on the number required to complete the outer valency of the metal. 4. The composition of claim 1, wherein the imidazopyrimidine-based ligand is selected from the group consisting of (A), (B), and (C) below: (A), (B), and (C). wherein Mi, M2, and M3 are transition metals independently selected from the group of transition metals of the periodic table; wherein R is any one or more of: compounds (I) though (XXXII) and hydrogen, halogen, hydroxyl, cyano, nitro, amino, alkylamino, dialkylamino, carboxyl, alkyl, alkenyl, alkynyl, aryl, arylalkyl, heteroaryl, heteroarylalkyl, cycloalkyl, and acyl; wherein, L is a small molecule ligand; wherein, n is an integer based on the number required to complete the outer valency of the metal; and, X is a g3-bridging ligand. 5. The composition of claim 1 wherein the imidazopyrimidine-based ligand is 2,7-di(pyridin- 2-yl)imidazo[ 1 ,2-a]pyrimidine (dpip). 6. The composition of claim 5 wherein the dpip is synthesized according to the process of scheme 1. 7. The composition according to claim 1 wherein the imidazopyrimidine-based ligand is synthesized into a multi-metallic complex. 8. The composition according to claim 7 wherein the multi-metallic complex is synthesized according to scheme 2. 9. The composition according to claim 3 or claim 4 wherein L is selected from the group: halide, CO, perchlorate, sulphate, carbonate, H2O, MeOH, MeCN, carboxylates such as trifluoroacetate, acetate, and the like; and n is 0-3. 10. The composition according to claim 9 wherein (L) n is a second or third equivalent of the ligand of any of claims 1-3. 11. The composition according to claim 2 wherein R3/R4/R5/R is any combination of R1/R2 and hydrogen, halogen, hydroxyl, cyano, nitro, amino, alkylamino, dialkylamino, carboxyl, alkyl, alkenyl, alkynyl, aryl, arylalkyl, heteroaryl, heteroarylalkyl, cycloalkyl, acyl, and the like. 12. The composition according to claim 2 or claim 3 wherein R1/R2 is any compound from claim 10. 13. The composition according to claim 3 or claim 4 wherein R1/R2 is any combination of R as exemplified by compounds (I) though (XXXI I) and hydrogen, halogen, hydroxyl, cyano, nitro, amino, alkylamino, dialkylamino, carboxyl, alkyl, alkenyl, alkynyl, aryl, arylalkyl, heteroaryl, heteroaryl alkyl, cycloalkyl, acyl, and the like. 14. The composition according to claim 4 wherein X is a ps-bridging ligand selected from the group comprising: OH, O, halide, S, SH, and the like. 15. A method, of producing a composition according to any of the above claims, comprising: providing an imadazopyrimidine containing ligand, one or more metal salts, and one or more optional small molecule ligands; combining the imadazopyrimidine containing ligand, one or more metal salts, and one or more optional small molecule ligands to form a first mixture; dissolving the first mixture in a solvent, forming a second mixture; bringing the second mixture to at least a first temperature while stirring, forming a crude metallic complex; and, working up the crude metallic complex to provide a purified metallic complex.
